title: Can you possess dual citizenship in Canada and should you keep it? - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Can you possess dual citizenship in Canada and should you keep it?
Partner Hilete Stein and Articling Student Sahar Fatima have been featured in Law360 Canada for their latest article on dual citizenship and renunciation of Canadian citizenship.
As questions around identity and global mobility continue to evolve, Hilete and Sahar break down Canada’s approach to dual citizenship, recent changes to citizenship by descent, and key considerations when renouncing citizenship.
This article was originally published by Law360 Canada, part of LexisNexis Canada Inc.

#### Hilete Stein B.A., LL.B., C.S.
